title: Mukkabaaz
subTitle: Shravan Singh, an aspiring boxer, finds an enemy in Bhagwan Das Mishra, the head of a boxing federation. Thereafter, things take a turn for the worse after he falls for Bhagwan's niece, Sunaina.

title: U-Turn
subTitle: A journalist investigating traffic offenders on a flyover becomes embroiled in an investigation after being accused of murdering one of the motorcyclists.

title: The Last Color
subTitle: Choti, a young tightrope walker, wishes to pursue her education but struggles to make a living. She soon befriends Noor, a widow who yearns to play Holi but is forced to live a life of abstinence.

title: Sonchiriya
subTitle: After their leader's death, a group of dacoits splits up and runs away. On the way, they meet two women and help them escape their family and reach the hospital.

title: Kadvi Hawa
subTitle: A blind old man, worried about the survival and well-being of his son, decides to strike a deal with a debt collector to prevent his child from falling into a debt trap.

title: Thappad
subTitle: Amrita, a young woman, leads a content life with her husband, Vikram. However, their happiness is shattered when he slaps her at an office party, causing her to file for a divorce.

title: Manikarnika
subTitle: After the death of her husband and child, Lakshmibai takes over the throne of Jhansi and defends the kingdom against the tyranny of the East India Company.

title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
subTitle: Major Vihaan Singh Shergill of the Indian Army leads a covert operation against a group of militants who attacked a base in Uri, Kashmir, in 2016 and killed many soldiers.

title: Dobaaraa
subTitle: A thunderstorm and a television set facilitate a woman to connect with the past and save a young boy's life. However, the turn of events put her present at risk.

title: Fitoor
subTitle: Noor, a Kashmiri boy from a poor family, is hired as a stable keeper by a begum. Later, when he begins to fall in love with Firdaus, the begum's daughter, she separates them by sending her away.

title: Mili
subTitle: Mili, a young woman, accidentally gets stuck in a walk-in freezer at her workplace. Racing against time, she must find a way to survive.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: Hotel Mumbai
subTitle: A hotel staff risks everything to keep its patrons safe during a terror attack, especially a British heiress, her husband and her infant.

title: Welcome to New York
subTitle: A recovery agent and a designer become part of a big Bollywood event in New York, where chaos ensues, changing their lives forever.

title: Mere Pyare Prime Minister
subTitle: After his mother is raped one night, Kannu, an eight-year-old boy, writes a letter to the prime minister of India and embarks on a journey from Mumbai to Delhi with his two friends.

title: Daddy
subTitle: Arun Gawli rises from poverty and becomes one of India's most notable gangsters. However, hungry for more power and influence, he launches a career in politics.

title: Suraj Pe Mangal Bhari
subTitle: Suraj, an eligible bachelor, finds himself getting rejected by the families of many potential brides. Soon, he learns that a wedding detective named Madhu Mangal Rane is the reason.

title: Kanjoos Makkichoos
subTitle: Jamnaprasad Pandey intends to send his parents on a pilgrimage. However, things take a devastating turn when they disappear during a flood.

title: Tarla
subTitle: With dreams bigger than every social barrier known to women, Tarla Dalal embarks on an inspirational journey to change the country's culinary landscape.

title: Madgaon Express
subTitle: Childhood friends Dodo, Ayush, and Pinku embark on a trip to Goa that goes completely off-track due to a sequence of terrible decisions.

title: Firaaq
subTitle: In the aftermath of Gujarat's violent 2002 riots, victims find their lives changed forever and reel from the deep impact the upheaval left on them.

title: Kismat Konnection
subTitle: Raj, an out-of-luck architect, and Priya, an out-of-love social activist, find themselves connected in a strange way by destiny.

title: Yudhra
subTitle: A vengeful youth infiltrates a dangerous cartel to avenge the death of his parents. As he delves deeper, he uncovers shocking truths about his past that challenge his resolve and moral boundaries.

title: Khaali Peeli
subTitle: Torn apart as young lovers, Pooja and Blackie's lives take different paths. Fate brings them back together after Pooja's courageous escape from a brothel.

title: Khaali Peeli
subTitle: Torn apart as young lovers, Pooja and Blackie's lives take different paths. Fate brings them back together after Pooja's courageous escape from a brothel.

title: Raman Raghav 2.0
subTitle: A serial killer stalks a drug-addicted detective investigating the killer's past crimes after noticing eerie similarities.

title: Jail
subTitle: A false drug accusation by a friend destroys Parag's life. He struggles through prison, clinging to hope for legal assistance to prove his innocence.

title: Lost
subTitle: A journalist relentlessly investigates to uncover the truth behind the sudden and mysterious disappearance of a young activist.

title: India Lockdown
subTitle: The lives of four individuals - a father, his pilot daughter, a prostitute, and a migrant worker - are thrown into turmoil when the Indian government announces a nationwide lockdown.

title: Go Goa Gone
subTitle: Things take a dangerous turn when the aftermath of a rave party causes three friends to get stranded on an isolated island infested with zombies.

title: Mom
subTitle: Devki, a biology teacher, seeks help from DK, a private detective, and vows to get revenge after her stepdaughter's rapists are acquitted by the court.

title: Saina
subTitle: Professional badminton player Saina Nehwal wins more than 24 international titles and achieves the top world spot in 2015.

title: Mrs. Chatterjee vs Norway
subTitle: Debika Chatterjee, an Indian woman living in Norway with her family, fights to regain custody of her children after Norwegian authorities take them away from her.

title: Laila Majnu
subTitle: Laila, a free-spirited woman and Qais, a young man from a liberal background fall in love despite societal and familial opposition, leading to separation and deep personal turmoil.

title: Jersey
subTitle: Arjun, a talented but failed cricketer, decides to return to cricket in his late thirties driven by the desire to represent the Indian cricket team and fulfil his son's wish for a jersey as a gift.

title: English Vinglish
subTitle: A housewife and caterer, Shashi, is usually mocked by her family for not knowing English. Her attempt to learn the language helps her rediscover herself and reassert her value as a mother and a wife.
